title: Parapteroceras escritorii
taxonomy: Parapteroceras escritorii is a species of fungus that belongs to the class Pezizomycetes within the division Ascomycota. This classification places it among the ascomycetous fungi, which are characterized by the production of ascospores. At the family level, Parapteroceras escritorii is classified under the family Pezizaceae, a group of fungi commonly known as cup fungi. The genus Parapteroceras is a relatively small group within this family, and Parapteroceras escritorii is the only known species within this genus. Further classification at the order and order subgroup level is within the Pezizales and Pezizineae respectively.
